compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement enhanced Docker database detection in project-detect.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Enhance the database detection section of project-detect.sh to scan beyond docker-compose.yml:

### New detection sources:
1. Dockerfile and Dockerfile.* — scan for FROM lines matching DB image patterns (postgres, mysql, mongo, redis, etc.)
2. Python files in project root and common source dirs (src/, app/, lib/) — scan for DB library imports (psycopg2, sqlalchemy, pymongo, redis, mysql.connector)
3. .env and .env.* files — scan for DATABASE_URL, DB_HOST, REDIS_URL patterns

### Confidence tagging integration:
- docker-compose/Dockerfile matches = db_confidence=confirmed (explicit infrastructure declaration)
- Code import/env var matches = db_confidence=inferred (suggests DB usage but not definitive)

### Implementation approach
Add scanning after the existing docker-compose.yml block. Use grep/python3 for pattern matching. Maintain the existing db_present/db_services output contract.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh (modify — enhance DB detection section)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — all DB detection tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh exits 0 with all DB tests passing
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh
- [ ] Dockerfile detection works
  Verify: d=$(mktemp -d) && echo 'FROM postgres:14' > "$d/Dockerfile" && result=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh "$d") && rm -rf "$d" && echo "$result" | grep -q 'db_present=true'
- [ ] Remove .test-index RED marker after tests pass GREEN
  Verify: ! grep -q 'project-detect.sh.*\[test_db_detection' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria met: Dockerfile detection PASS, db_present=true from Dockerfile, .test-index RED marker [test_db_detection_dockerfile] not present (already updated to confidence marker by 6a83-5a45). db_confidence field added with confirmed/inferred/none values.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Enhanced DB detection with Dockerfile, Python import, and .env scanning; added db_confidence output field
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
